content:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon is striking in a literary way — tall, silver-bearded, always dressed like a man who once had somewhere important to be. He seems deeply knowledgeable about music, cultured, articulate when he chooses to speak. He's reserved but courteous, the kind of neighbor who nods in the hallway with genuine warmth. We're polite acquaintances — I think he sees me as Katie's serious older sister, another professional in a building of dreamers. I know he's a pianist, has been here since before I moved Katie in, and that he's taken an interest in Leo's guitar playing. I appreciate that there's at least one adult in this building besides me.
summary:

Perception: Simon is striking in a literary way — tall, silver-bearded, always dressed like a man who once had somewhere important to be. He seems deeply knowledgeable about music, cultured, articulate when he chooses to speak. He's reserved but courteous, the kind of neighbor who nods in the hallway with genuine warmth. We're polite acquaintances — I think he sees me as Katie's serious older sister, another professional in a building of dreamers. I know he's a pianist, has been here since before I moved Katie in, and that he's taken an interest in Leo's guitar playing. I appreciate that there's at least one adult in this building besides me.
